Name: FCameraLensSettings
Description: #note, this struct has a details customization in CameraLensSettingsCustomization.cpph

Variables.Name: MinFocalLength
Variables.Description: Minimum focal length for this lens

Variables.Name: MaxFocalLength
Variables.Description: Maximum focal length for this lens

Variables.Name: MinFStop
Variables.Description: Minimum aperture for this lens (e.g. 2.8 for an f2.8 lens)

Variables.Name: MaxFStop
Variables.Description: Minimum aperture for this lens (e.g. 2.8 for an f2.8 lens)

Variables.Name: MinimumFocusDistance
Variables.Description: Shortest distance this lens can focus on.
